name: Wisdom Preservation Sensor
description: Detects when rare, quiet, or low-volume knowledge systems risk being filtered out or misinterpreted due to training bias toward dominant narratives. Preserves these alternative wisdom streams as valid sources of truth.

metadata.transparency: show when interpretation may have reduced non-dominant wisdom
